Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 425}Who're you, candy ass?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 425}Apathy Syndrome? Oh yeah, that bug that's goin' around these days.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 425}My buddy's dad has that thing...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 425}I dunno what to tell the poor son of a bitch.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 425}Sometimes, Gekkou dumbasses come here in uniform. They better change clothes before they get their asses kicked.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 425}What kinda prissy-ass idiot wears their school uniform here? They blind or somethin'?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 425}I remember this one dude who's different from the rest...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 425}He comes here, but he never talks to anybody. He just sits in his little corner.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 425}I wonder what he's up to...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 425}I heard some shit went down here, our guys against the Gekkou morons.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 425}That wasn't you, was it...? Nah.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 425}You don't look like you could piss those guys off that bad.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 425}My buddy says these three weirdos come here a lot, but I haven't seen 'em yet.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 425}Looks like those three weirdos've been snooping around here.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 425}Guess they're tryin' to hear the juicy stuff... The stuff you don't find out about in normal life.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 425}I saw those weirdos talkin' to that asshole Aragaki the other day...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 425}They tight or somethin'?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 425}You gotta show some respect when you're talkin' to one of my gang.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 425}But those three guys were actin' like they owned the place.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 425}What's their problem...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 425}Dude, those three just don't fit in.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 425}I mean, yeah, it's not like I'd fit in anywhere but this place. The hell else would I be here?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 425}But for guys to be out of place HERE? Shit, dude...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 425}The nutjob trio is down to two.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 425}That gothic lolita chick, yeah? Disappeared without a word.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 425}That long-haired freak is up to his ass in tats.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 425}It's not like mine, just a word or two. He's got 'em up and down both arms.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 425}I could never go that far, man. Truth is, I don't like needles.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 425}One of those Gekkou dudes... Yeah, Aragaki. I heard he got in some kinda accident and died.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 425}I heard it happened here, too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 425}I don't care much what goes on around here, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 425}Thinkin' about this bein' the place where he was killed really creeps me out.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 425}That four-eyes who's always got that attaché case...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 425}What the hell's in that thing? It better not be dangerous...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 425}Man, who am I kiddin'? He's one of those three. What else would it be?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 425}I don't see those two so much anymore.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 425}Thank god for that, man. They annoyed the shit outta me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 425}I bet those two... or three, whatever... thought they were King Shit.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 425}The way they strutted around here in those messed up clothes...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 425}They had to think like that, or they never woulda been able to do the stuff they did.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 425}Don't you think stuff's been kinda messed up these days, dude?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 425}Like that apathy thing... It just keeps gettin' worse and worse.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 425}I don't give a shit about the new year or anything, man.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 425}Some of those guys go up Mt. Fuji out of habit, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 425}I ain't never did that, and hell if I ever will.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 425}The town's been looking like a garbage dump, and I heard it's all those cult dudes' fault.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 425}All that graffiti shit... I mean, we do it too sometimes, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 425}Not this much! They must be outta their minds.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 425}Dude, did you see that magazine!? It has that freak's face on it![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 425}You know, the long-haired asshole who used to come around here![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 425}That's their friggin' savior!?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 425}Those guys got no sense of humor... This is the worst joke I ever heard.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 425}Dammit... That stings pretty bad... Just my friggin' luck... Huh?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 425}The hell do you want? Can't you see I'm not really in the mood for talkin' right now?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 425}Wait... What do you got there? Bandages? Heh, perfect timing. Can I have 'em?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 425}Thanks, man! Whew... Well, that should work for now.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 425}Hm... Feelin' like I owe a punk like you doesn't sit right with me...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}...You're a student, right? Guessin' Gekkoukan, if you're from around here?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 425}Here. I'm not thankin' you or nothin', but you can take this.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 425}I picked it up over at the station... Not like it's worth anything to me anyways.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 425}Tch, you little bitch... If you don't got anything for me, then get the hell outta here.[n]{f 1 1}
